releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This is the first official release of Obsidian Conceal Plugin!

## Work that's gone into making this happen
* fix tsconfig by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/4
* remove module override in rollup config by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/11
* 9 in live preview replaced text isnt clickable by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/12
* don't add decorator if match is in a codeblock by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/14
* 6 update the readme by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/15
* add regexp to compare node.name to 'inline-code' by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/17
* 7 ensure obsidian best practices for plugins by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/20
* Bump release to 1.0.0 by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/pull/21
* Release/1.0.0 by @mattcoleanderson in https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-dynamic-text-concealer/pull/23


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mattcoleanderson/obsidian-conceal-plugin/commits/1.0.0
